vocab.meaning: một sự thay đổi hoàn toàn/đột phá
vocab.example: There has been a sea change in how news websites deliver content, moving from static articles to immersive, interactive multimedia.

vocab.meaning: các tính năng phụ kiện/trang trí thêm cho hấp dẫn
vocab.example: Many sites I visit have added all sorts of bells and whistles like AI chatbots and animated interfaces that weren't there a year ago.

vocab.word: in the twinkling of an eye
vocab.example: Modern websites now load in the twinkling of an eye thanks to better optimization and faster servers.
I've noticed that many free platforms tend to clutter up their homepages with too many intrusive advertisements lately.

vocab.meaning: bắt kịp xu hướng/thay đổi để phù hợp
vocab.example: Older educational sites are finally starting to get with the program by introducing mobile-friendly versions of their portals.

vocab.meaning: thay đổi để hợp thời/không bị lạc hậu
vocab.example: To survive the competition, even traditional encyclopedias have had to move with the times and embrace a social-media-style layout.

vocab.meaning: phần bổ sung làm mọi thứ tốt đẹp hơn nữa
vocab.example: The site was already informative, but the addition of a 'dark mode' feature was really the icing on the cake for me.

vocab.meaning: tân trang/thay đổi diện mạo bên ngoài
vocab.example: The design team decided to give the entire interface a facelift, replacing the dull colors with a more vibrant palette.

vocab.meaning: điều bình thường/hiển nhiên thường thấy
vocab.example: Frequent layout changes are now par for the course in the world of social media as platforms fight for our attention.

vocab.meaning: vẹn cả đôi đường/kết hợp được ưu điểm của cả hai
vocab.example: The new update offers the best of both worlds: a minimalist design that still manages to be incredibly feature-rich.
